text_block_list.text:
After class, the previously clear skies turn into
heavy rain.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh no, it's pouring.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: What?! No waaay!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I was going to eat sooo many marvelous sundaes
today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pffft. What the heck? That's so dum—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did I say something weird?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oops... N-no, it was nothing. Just ignore us.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, my trainer said there's something
more exciting than sundaes!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Really?! What is it? Tell meee!
choice_data_list: Uh... a game we can all play together?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Games? I don't think we have any just lying
arou—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hold on.

Nice Nature gets some milk caps and puts them
on the floor.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's an oldie, so I don't know if you'll like it.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What's thiiis? ☆ I've never seen anything like
them! How marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, I suppose a whippersnapper like you
wouldn't know about this game.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's called milk caps. See, you stack them up and
slam them like this!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Whoa! They flipped!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, you keep flipping the caps on the
floor.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Super-duper marvelous! ☆ It'd be so much fun to
play with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Everyone?! Wait! ...And she's gone.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, so this is the game you were talking about!
These milk caps are so cute! They look like
pins! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hey! There's one with Carrot Ranger on it too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well then. Now that everyone has a milk cap,
shall we begin?

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh!

Under the guidance of Nice Nature, everyone has
fun playing milk caps.

The game is simple, but the surprising amount of
strategy involved captivates everyone.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Uuuggh... The stack is so small now! I can't flip
any!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh, here's a pro tip. You can just aim at the
stack like so, and...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're a pro, Nature! You flipped all of
them!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I didn't expect this to turn into such a big event...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But sometimes it's fun to get everyone together.

Milk caps is the biggest game on campus for a
while after.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, what? That sounds like a little too much
for my ol' body, so I'll pa—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to the gym, you two! ☆ We can invite
everyone and play tag there! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: W-wait, quit pulling me! I said I'm not going!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: This is so fun! ☆ One more round! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Waaaait! You seriously wanna keep going?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Of course! ♪ I'm nowhere neeear done!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose this time! I'll use my Pegasus Mach
Strike so no one can catch me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... How are none of you tired?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I'm not the only one.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I have a suggestion. How 'bout we sneak out of
this war zone?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All righty, I'll leave you young'uns to it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Nature and her trainer are running away!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, they must be expanding the game's
boundaries to cover the entire academy! How
exciting! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I didn't say that!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Get 'emmm!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, come ooon!

They continue chasing us. Even though we're
exhausted, it seems to be a good workout for
Nice Nature.
